[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 110111101 7
5 001101001 4
6 001101110 5
7 010111000 4

12 000000001 1

34 000100000 1

70 000000010 1
